_paths_comment: Portable paths: ${HOUFIN_DATA}/${HOUFIN_PROCESSED} expand at load (src/config_utils.py; default <repo>/data and <repo>/data/processed locally, override via env on HPC). NOTE: the DESK/encoder pipeline is a later milestone; this layout is provisional and its stream wiring (2-stream state_*_bio_ema10 -> N-stream state_*) is still to be reconciled.

bbs._comment: BBS spatiotemporal community integration. mode 'off'|'validate'|'enrich' via top-level-adjacent bbs_mode above.
bbs._smooth_comment: Gaussian NW smoothing in GRID CELLS (25 km). sigma_s ~5 cells (~125 km stdev, borrows ~+-250 km) for good continental coverage of the sparse BBS network -- the point of spatiotemporal borrowing. No expansion-front concern: House Finch (the transfer target) is excluded from the community.
bbs._ablation_comment: MAX-PERMISSIVE ablation (all suppression knobs loosened AT ONCE) to see how much temporal change is representable vs how much our smoothing/shrinkage flattens: sigma_t 3->1 (less temporal blur), pseudocount 0.5->0.1, shrink_k 2->0 (no EB pull to regional trend), cap ln10->ln100 (100x swings; still cannot reach true 0 -- structural). Not a production setting.

desk._spatial_conv_comment: Tight residual masked (partial) conv on the latent grid: injects neighbourhood context a point-wise encoder cannot learn. gamma inits 0 so training starts as the exact point-wise, ESK-aligned model. kernel=3 => 3x3 (one 25km ring).
